essence: Two detrimental AngelEye failures diagnosed: the data directory came up empty after restart (650+ sessions gone, unclear if a backfill is needed) and every chat window's stop-hook dies when the app's port isn't running — the startup script must become self-healing (check existing processes/ports, handle conflicts, fail gracefully).
